purpose: Select an open battery dataset for a semi-real ECM coefficient-slot experiment.
status: BATT-0 complete; BATT-1 data download and variable audit complete; BATT-2 OCV calibration complete; BATT-3 constant ECM baseline complete; BATT-3b OCV/residual diagnostics complete; BATT-3c discharge-OCV current-sign corrected ECM complete; BATT-4a R0-slot diagnostics complete; BATT-4b residual/dynamic-slot diagnostics complete; BATT-4c narrow dynamic q_tau pilot complete; BATT-4d cell-transfer/SOC/OCV alignment diagnostics complete.

primary_candidate.name: Lithium-ion Battery OCV and Dynamic Test Data of a LiFePO4 cylindrical cell
primary_candidate.selection_reason: Contains OCV and dynamic tests for an A123 26650 m1b LiFePO4 cell across -25 to 45 degC, directly matching first-order ECM coefficient-slot identification.

candidate_sources.name: Lithium-ion Battery OCV and Dynamic Test Data of a LiFePO4 cylindrical cell
LG 18650HG2 Li-ion Battery Data and Example Deep Neural Network xEV SOC Estimator Script
candidate_sources.decision: Use as a second source or external validation after the LiFePO4 ECM pipeline is working.

candidate_sources.name: CALCE Battery Data
candidate_sources.license: Open access data page; per-dataset citation and usage details must be checked before use.

candidate_sources.name: NASA Li-ion Battery Aging Datasets
candidate_sources.license: Not specified on the audited portal page.
candidate_sources.decision: Backup only because the task is aging/RUL-oriented and license status needs additional review.

candidate_sources.name: Comprehensive battery aging dataset: capacity and impedance fade measurements of a lithium-ion NMC/C-SiO cell
candidate_sources.license: Check linked data repository before use.
candidate_sources.decision: High-value later dataset, but too large and complex for the first ECM pass.

next_action: Use BATT-4a/BATT-4c/BATT-4d as same-cell positive evidence plus cross-cell boundary diagnosis; obtain cell-specific OCV/SOC calibration before claiming cross-cell generalization.
